roadside
========

.. py:module:: roadside

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   Docstring for roadside.py

   Aubrey Moore (aubreymoore2013@gmail.com)
   Last modified: 2026-02-19

   This module provides python functions for building automated detection of coconut rhinoceros beetle
   damage in digital images.



Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   roadside.flip_wkt_origin
   roadside.conv_poly_from_array_to_wkt
   roadside.conv_poly_from_wkt_to_array
   roadside.check_gpu
   roadside.run_sam3_semantic_predictor
   roadside.get_data_for_images_table
   roadside.get_data_for_detections_table
   roadside.clean_contour
   roadside.calculate_efd
   roadside.get_feature_vector
   roadside.normalize
   roadside.reconstruct
   roadside.visualize_harmonics


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: flip_wkt_origin(wkt_string: str, image_height: int) -> str

   Transforms a WKT polygon from top-left origin to bottom-left origin.

   Formula:
   x' = x
   y' = height - y


.. py:function:: conv_poly_from_array_to_wkt(poly: numpy.array) -> str

.. py:function:: conv_poly_from_wkt_to_array(poly_wkt: str) -> numpy.array

.. py:function:: check_gpu()

   Checks for GPU availability and prints CUDA version and GPU device name if available.
   Returns True if GPU is available, otherwise False.


.. py:function:: run_sam3_semantic_predictor(input_image_path, text_prompts)

.. py:function:: get_data_for_images_table(results_cpu, image_path: str) -> tuple

   Gets data for for a single image for insertion as a record in the 'images' database table.
   Returns data as a tuple: (image_width, image_height, timestamp, latitude, longitude)
   image_width and image_height come from results_cpu
   timestamp, latitude, longitude come from the EXIF metadata embedded in the image, if it exists.


.. py:function:: get_data_for_detections_table(results_cpu, image_id: int) -> pandas.DataFrame

   Gets data for for a single image for insertion as records in the 'detections' database table.
   Returns data as a pandas dataframe containing columns for image_id, class_id, poly_wkt, x_min, y_min, x_max, y_max, confidence


.. py:function:: clean_contour(contour: numpy.ndarray, sigma: float = 1.0) -> numpy.ndarray

   Internal: Removes spikes and jitter.


.. py:function:: calculate_efd(contour: numpy.ndarray, harmonics: int = 20) -> numpy.ndarray

   Internal: Standard Kuhl and Giardina EFD math.


.. py:function:: get_feature_vector(contour: numpy.ndarray) -> numpy.ndarray

   Processes a polygon and returns a normalized 1D feature vector.


.. py:function:: normalize(coeffs: numpy.ndarray) -> numpy.ndarray

   Internal: Rotation, size, and starting-point invariance.


.. py:function:: reconstruct(feature_vector: numpy.ndarray, num_points: int = 200) -> tuple[numpy.ndarray, numpy.ndarray]

   Reconstructs (x, y) coordinates from a feature vector.


.. py:function:: visualize_harmonics(contour: numpy.ndarray, harmonic_list: list[int] = [1, 3, 10, 50]) -> None

   Plots original vs reconstructed shapes for various harmonics.
